title: gutierrezia triflora
intro: Gutierrezia triflora, also known as bitterbrush, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gutierrezia triflora include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
